title: Hiring Production Engineer at Amara Raja Batteries Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Amara Raja Batteries Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amara Raja Batteries Global Group:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries Global Group!
